subject: Still waiting on fault codes, {{FIRST_NAME}}?
preview_text: Diagnose a VFD fault in 30 seconds — not 30 minutes. Try it now.
headline: Stop waiting. Start fixing.
body_html:
{{FIRST_NAME}}, you’re not alone if you’ve stood at a faulted GS10 drive or Allen-Bradley panel with no manual in hand.

Most techs lose 20–40 minutes per fault just finding the right page or waiting on OEM support.

With Mira, you get answers in seconds by doing exactly what you already do:

  1. Snap a photo of the fault code
  2. Paste it into Mira (web, Slack, or Telegram)
  3. Get the fix from your own manuals — not a generic PDF

You’ve got {{QUERIES_LEFT}} free queries left. One photo is all it takes to see the difference.
cta_text: Open your CMMS and try it
